title: First show in 5 Palmas
description: Los Aldeanos debut live in the 5 Palmas neighborhood, beginning a journey that would transform Cuban underground rap.

title: Duo formation
description: Aldo Roberto Rodríguez Baquero (Al2) and Bian Oscar Rodríguez Galá (El B) solidify Los Aldeanos with a raw, reflective style.

title: Censurados
description: An album that crystallizes their critical and poetic voice—a cornerstone of conscious rap in Cuba.

title: Poesía Esposada
description: A work deepening metaphor, love, and social critique with remarkable lyrical maturity.

title: El Atropello
description: A release that broadens their reach and reinforces messages of freedom, independent thought, and youth empowerment.

title: Duo separation
description: Los Aldeanos announce their split. Each artist continues solo, expanding the movement's legacy.

title: Solo careers
description: Al2 and El B pursue individual projects, keeping the duo's influence alive for new generations of Cuban rappers.
